LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT VELLUTINI CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO BUILD GROUP INC'S SECOND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION DEMURRED TO. THE RATIONALE IS THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGES AN ALTERNATIVE FACTUAL LEGAL THEORY THAT THERE IS AN IMPLIED INDEMNITY ARRANGEMENT IF THE WORK ORDER IS DETERMINED TO BE UNENFORCEABLE AS AN AGREEMENT TO AGREE RATHER THAN AS A BINDING EXPRESSION OF THE PARTIES INTENT. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) COUNSEL FOR VELLUTINI DBA ROYAL ELECTRIC TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288, EMAIL:SWONG@SFTC.ORG. (302)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY BUILD GROUP, INC. ; DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF AUF-G-25-2017 BUILD GROUP, INC. CROSS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61855552)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Continued To Jul-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION Of Demurrer To Build Group Incs Second Amended Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Erin McDonough Esq. 916-993-4547 of O'Connor Thompson for Defendant/Cross-Defendant Vellutini Corporation.
Michelle Akerman, Esq. 415-995-5172 for Cross Complainant Build group Inc.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument changes the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT VELLUTINI CORPORATION'S, Demurrer To Build Group Inc's Second Amended Cross Complaint is overruled as to all Causes of Action demurred to. The rationale is the second cause of action alleges an alternative factual legal theory that there is an implied indemnity arrangement if the work order is determined to be unenforceable as an agreement to agree rather than as a binding expression of the parties intent. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Counsel for Vellutini dba Royal Electric to submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288, email:swong@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
